summary: Hyunwoo Kang works to increase the proficiency of his Hyuncheonmagon skill to reach five stars, eventually using a rare elixr called the Hyuncheonmaseong's Elixir to trigger a massive stat boost. After mastering the skill and obtaining the complete secret manual, he encounters bandits and tests his new 'Hyuncheon' ability, which sharpens his senses in combat. Following the battle, he is approached by a mysterious Taoist named Cheongpung, who becomes suspicious of Hyunwoo's true identity and martial arts background.
key_moments: Hyunwoo consumes the Hyuncheonmaseong's Elixir, gaining significant stat increases and reaching 5-star mastery.
Hyunwoo activates the 'Hyuncheon' skill during a skirmish with mountain bandits, allowing him to perceive their movements in slow motion.
A Taoist named Cheongpung confronts Hyunwoo, questioning his true identity and expressing suspicion.
